title: Smaller Totems
body:
![SmallerTotemsBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25bcba331444085b1c63616645b49ba45d9fccb9_0.webp)
# What is Smaller Totems?

Smaller Totems is a simple and extremely light resource pack that makes totems smaller so that they don't take up as much of the screen. It's very useful in PVP situations where you don't want your totem getting in your way.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Feel free to use this in your modpack as long as some sort of credit is shown :)
